rankings.why_it_matters: Highlights regional industrial development and India's opportunity in the global shipbuilding and repair supply chain.

rankings.title: Cyber threats moving beyond data theft, now risk human lives: Deloitte
rankings.india_relevance: Credible analysis of the evolving nature of cyber risks, relevant to Indian corporations and infrastructure.
rankings.why_it_matters: Highlights a critical shift from financial to physical safety risks, necessitating new investment and regulatory frameworks.
